name: Orange-Scented Chocolate Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces sweet baking chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
Microwave Version
1. Place the butter and chocolate in a small glass bowl.
2. Microwave on 50% power for 1 minute, then stir.
3. Continue microwaving for 1 to 3 minutes more, stirring occasionally until smooth.
4. Stir in the orange juice and orange rind.
Preparation time:
Storage suggestion: The sauce can be prepared up to 5 days in advance and stored, covered, in the refrigerator. Gently reheat in a saucepan or microwave before using.
